# Feature Report: [Feature Name]
example feature report title: REP-FEAT-{three-digit-index}-{slug}.md

doc_id: FEAT-[000]

version: 1.0.0
status: draft
created: [YYYY-MM-DD]

reviewers: none
tags: feature, enhancement

## Feature Overview
[Provide a high-level summary of the new feature and its primary goals. Why was it built?]

## Use Cases
[Describe the primary user stories or use cases this feature addresses. How will users interact with it?]

## Architectural Changes
[Detail any significant architectural, database, or API changes introduced by this feature. Leave blank if none.]

## Implementation Details
[Describe how the feature was implemented at a technical level. Which key components, modules, or services were created or modified?]

## Testing Strategy & Rollout
[Explain how the feature was tested (e.g., unit tests, integration tests, manual QA). Include any notes on rollout plans, feature flags, or backwards compatibility considerations.]
